## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between Fable Security and GrowthX for AI-powered content creation and marketing strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-powered content creation, strategy, and distribution services](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Fable Security (Curtis) is interested but wants to involve new CCO (starting Sept 15) before deciding](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
  - [Follow-up demo scheduled for Sept 19th at 10am PT to showcase GrowthX platform and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [GrowthX pricing: $20k strategy sprint + $15k/mo ongoing execution](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview

  - [End-to-end partner for content strategy, creation, and distribution](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Uses AI workflows + human expertise to create content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [60+ clients, $10M+ revenue, 70+ employees](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Founded by Marcel Santilli (ex-CMO of HashiCorp, ServiceTitan, Scale)](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Key differentiators: AI tech + deep industry expertise on team](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)

### Fable Security's Current Situation

  - Recently out of stealth (\< 1 month ago)
  - [Curtis is sole marketing person, very resource-constrained](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Using semi-manual process with SME interviews + ChatGPT for content](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Focusing on thought leadership to differentiate from competitors](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Bringing on new CCO Sept 15th to oversee marketing](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)

### GrowthX Process & Offerings

  - [8-week strategy sprint to develop key artifacts/workflows ($20k)](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [12-month growth execution phase with daily publishing ($15k/mo)](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Create detailed personas, company context docs as inputs](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Use modular AI workflows, connecting multiple LLMs for best results](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [Offer strategy, content creation, publishing, image generation](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

### Potential Value for Fable

  - [Scale content creation beyond Curtis' bandwidth](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [Leverage GrowthX's existing AI infrastructure/workflows](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [Tap into deep industry expertise on GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Enable faster testing/validation of marketing hypotheses](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Support Fable's focus on thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send content examples and case studies to Curtis](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [Follow-up demo meeting scheduled for Sept 19th at 10am PT](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up Slack channel for easier communication](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Re-engage after Sept 15th once new CCO has started at Fable](https://fathom.video/share/N9ocfTUJwfoekMthqBKkYs4KnTezis3e?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
